name: Human
description: Versatile and adaptable, humans excel in all disciplines.

name: Elf
description: Graceful and wise, elves have a natural affinity for magic.

name: Dark Elf
description: Cunning and agile, dark elves thrive in shadow and subterfuge.

name: Dwarf
description: Stout and resilient, dwarves are master craftsmen and fierce fighters.

name: Gnome
description: Small but brilliant, gnomes possess keen intellect and natural curiosity.

name: Orc
description: Powerful and fearsome, orcs are born warriors with unmatched strength.
